zh.lifeSummary: 當Diego Gutiérrez de Ceballos於1282年出生在西班牙劍橋大學默里 卡斯利時，他的父親Ruy González de Ceballos28歲，母親Maria Fernández de Caviedes26歲。他於1299年與Juana García Carrillo在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1299年登記服兵役。他去世於1330年4月8日在西班牙坎塔布里亞埃斯卡蘭特享年48歲，埋葬在西班牙阿斯圖里亞斯利阿斯布爾納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Diego Gutiérrez de Ceballos于1282年出生在西班牙劍橋大學默里 卡斯利时，他的父亲Ruy González de Ceballos28岁，母亲Maria Fernández de Caviedes26岁。他于1299年与Juana García Carrillo在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1299年登记服兵役。他去世于1330年4月8日在西班牙坎塔布里亞埃斯卡蘭特享年48岁，埋葬在西班牙阿斯圖里亞斯利阿斯布爾納。

nameMeanings.name: Gutiérrez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Jesus, Manuel, Carlos, Francisco, Jorge, Pedro, Raul, Miguel, Roberto.

Spanish (Gutiérrez): patronymic from the medieval personal name Gutierre, from a Visigothic personal name of uncertain form and meaning, perhaps a compound of the elements gunthi ‘battle’ + hairus ‘sword’.

variants.name: Gutierez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jesus, Jose, Ignacio, Manuel, Adalberto, Ana Maria, Angel, Carlota, Emilio, Exiquio, Felipe, Fermin.
Hispanic (Gutiérez): altered form of Spanish Gutiérrez (see Gutierrez ).

variants.name: Gutirrez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Gutiérrez (see Gutierrez ).

variants.name: Guterrez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Gutiérrez (see Gutierrez ).

variants.name: Guiterrez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Arturo, Francisco, Alfredo, Jesus, Rafael, Raul, Carlos, Guadalupe, Jose Luis.
Hispanic (Guitérrez): altered form of Spanish Gutiérrez (see Gutierrez ).

variants.name: Gutierres
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Ramon, Jesus, Juan, Manuel, Alberto, Alfonzo, Alvaro, Ana, Andres, Antelmo, Catalina.
Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Gutiérrez (see Gutierrez ).

variants.name: Guitierez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Gutiérrez (see Gutierrez ).

variants.name: Guttierrez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jesus, Jose, Pablo, Raul, Reina, Adolfo, Beatriz, Carlos, Diego, Evangelina, Felicita, Humberto.
Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Gutiérrez (see Gutierrez ).

variants.name: Guitierrez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Enrique, Jaime, Manuel, Miguel, Ofelia, Ricardo, Salvador, Andres, Argentina, Armando.
Hispanic (Guitiérrez): altered form of Spanish Gutiérrez (see Gutierrez ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ceballos
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Luis, Juan, Carlos, Manuel, Francisco, Mario, Sergio, Javier, Jesus, Miguel, Ramon.
Spanish: habitational name from a place called Ceballos in Cantabria. Compare   Cevallos  ,   Zeballos  , and   Zevallos  .

variants.name: Ceballo
meanings: Spanish (mainly southern): probably an altered form (singular) of   Ceballos  .

variants.name: Cevallos
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Juan, Manuel, Pedro, Fernando, Jose, Luis, Eduardo, Francisco, Jaime, Ana, Angel.
Spanish: variant of   Ceballos  .

nameMeanings.name: Diego
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Origin uncertain; perhaps from Santiago or from a native Iberian name found in Latin as Didacus.

en.lifeSummary: When Diego Gutiérrez de Ceballos was born in 1282, in New Castile, Spain, his father, Ruy González de Ceballos, was 28 and his mother, Maria Fernández de Caviedes, was 26. He married Juana García Carrillo in 1299, in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He registered for military service in 1299. He died on 8 April 1330, in Escalante, Cantabria, Spain, at the age of 48, and was buried in Buelna, Llanes, Asturias, Spain.

fr.Cayón, Laracha, La Coruña, Galicia, Espa: Cayón, A Laracha, A Coruña, Galicia, Espagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Diego Gutiérrez de Ceballos est né en 1282, à New Castile, Espagne, son père, Ruy González de Ceballos, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Maria Fernández de Caviedes, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Juana García Carrillo en 1299, à Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1299. Il est décédé le 8 avril 1330, à Escalante, Cantabria, Espagne, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Buelna, Llanes, Asturias, Espagne.

de.Cayón, Laracha, La Coruña, Galicia, Espa: Cayón, A Laracha, A Coruña, Galicia, Spanien
de.lifeSummary: Als Diego Gutiérrez de Ceballos 1282 in New Castile, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ruy González de Ceballos 28 und seine Mutter Maria Fernández de Caviedes 26. Er hat 1299 in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien Juana García Carrillo geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er hat sich 1299 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 8. April 1330 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Escalante, Cantabria, Spanien und wurde in Buelna, Llanes, Asturias, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Diego Gutiérrez de Ceballos è nato il nel 1282 nel New Castile, Spagna, il suo padre, Ruy González de Ceballos, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Maria Fernández de Caviedes, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Juana García Carrillo nel 1299, nel Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1299. Morì il 8 aprile 1330, nel Escalante, Cantabria, Spagna, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Buelna, Llanes, Asturias, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Diego Gutiérrez de Ceballosが1282年にスペインニュー カスティルで生まれた時，父Ruy González de Ceballosは28歳，母Maria Fernández de Caviedesは26歳であった。1299年にスペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレドでJuana García Carrilloと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1299年に兵役登録をした。彼は1330年4月8日にスペインカンタブリアエスカラントで48歳で死去し，スペインアストゥリアスランスブエルナにて埋葬された。

ko.Cayón, Laracha, La Coruña, Galicia, Espa: 스페인 갈리샤 아 코루n아 아 라라차 카이o
ko.lifeSummary: Diego Gutiérrez de Ceballos(이)가 1282년 스페인 뉴 카스틸에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ruy González de Ceballos(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Maria Fernández de Caviedes(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1299년 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도에서 Juana García Carrillo(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1299년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1330년 4월 8일 스페인 캔타브리아 스알랜티에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 애스투리아스 랜스 버나에 묻혔다.

pt.Cayón, Laracha, La Coruña, Galicia, Espa: Cayón, A Laracha, A Coruña, Galicia, Espanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Diego Gutiérrez de Ceballos nasceu em 1282, em New Castile, Espanha, seu pai, Ruy González de Ceballos, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Maria Fernández de Caviedes, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Juana García Carrillo em 1299, em Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1299. Ele faleceu em 8 de abril de 1330, em Escalante, Cantabria, Espanha, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Buelna, Llanes, Asturias, Espanha.

ro.Cayón, Laracha, La Coruña, Galicia, Espa: Cayón, A Laracha, A Coruña, Galicia, Spania

ru.Cayón, Laracha, La Coruña, Galicia, Espa: кеиoн, а ларэича, а коруnа, галися, Испания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Diego Gutiérrez de Ceballos родился в 1282 г. в местности ню кастиль, Испания, его отцу по имени Ruy González de Ceballos было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria Fernández de Caviedes, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Juana García Carrillo в 1299 г. в местности толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. В 1299 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 8 апреля 1330 г. в местности эскалант, кантабря, Испания в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности буелна, лланесь, астуряс, Испания.

es.Cayón, Laracha, La Coruña, Galicia, Espa: Cayón, Laracha, La Coruña, Galicia, España
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Diego Gutiérrez de Ceballos nació en 1282, en New Castile, España, su papá, Ruy González de Ceballos, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Maria Fernández de Caviedes, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Juana García Carrillo en 1299, en Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1299. Murió el 8 de abril de 1330, en Escalante, Cantabria, España, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Buelna, Llanes, Asturias, España.
